mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as ts, sum( m.unbalance_alarm = 1 or m.misalignment_alarm = 1 or m.rotor_alarm = 1 or m.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 or m.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 or m.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 or m.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 or m.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 or m.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 or m.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 or m.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 or m.DE_RMS_ALARM = 1 or m.NDE_RMS_ALARM = 1 or p.impeller_alarm = 1 or p.cavitation_alarm = 1 or p.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 or p.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 or p.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 or p.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 or p.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 or p.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 or p.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 or p.NDE_FTF_alarm =1 or m.DE_RMS_ALARM = 1 or m.NDE_RMS_ALARM = 1 ) as Alram FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR as m LEFT JOIN TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP as p on m.motor_id = p.PUMP_ID and m.ACQ_DATE = p.ACQ_DATE JOIN TB_PUMP_INF as tpi ON tpi.motor_id = p.PUMP_ID and tpi.motor_id = m.motor_id WHERE m.ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59') and m.ACQ_DATE >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'),' 00:00:00') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(m.ACQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY m.ACQ_DATE DESC;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ALR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as ALR_TIME, FAC_NAME, FAC_INFO, DIAG_STUS, ( CASE WHEN FLAG = 1 THEN 'Alert' WHEN FLAG = 2 THEN 'TRIP' ELSE 'None' END ) AS 'FLAG' FROM TB_PMS_ALR WHERE ALR_TIME <= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 23:59:59') AND ALR_TIME >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') order by ALR_TIME desc;
